sections.title: Library Membership
sections.subtitle: A conversation about registering for a library card

questions.question: Member name: _______
questions.explanation: The member states her name as Emma Davis.|会员说她的名字是Emma Davis。

questions.question: Address: 42 _______ Street
questions.explanation: She lives at 42 Oak Street.|她住在橡树街42号。

questions.question: Postcode: _______
questions.explanation: The postcode is SW1A 1AA.|邮编是SW1A 1AA。

questions.question: Phone number: _______
questions.explanation: Her phone number is 07700 900456.|她的电话号码是07700 900456。

questions.question: What type of membership?
questions.explanation: She qualifies for a student membership.|她符合学生会员资格。

questions.question: Membership fee: £_______
questions.explanation: The student membership costs 25 pounds.|学生会员费为25英镑。

questions.question: Number of books allowed: _______
questions.explanation: She can borrow up to 8 books.|她最多可以借8本书。

questions.question: Loan period: _______ weeks
questions.explanation: The standard loan period is three weeks.|标准借阅期为三周。

questions.question: Which section is she most interested in?
questions.explanation: She prefers the fiction section.|她喜欢小说区。

questions.question: Library card number: _______
questions.explanation: Her library card number is L78492.|她的借书卡号码是L78492。
